description: Tag-to-agent routing. Determines which production agents (in macro-brain) wake up for a given document based on its routing_tags. Lightweight pre-tagging happens BEFORE any LLM call to avoid wasted spend on irrelevant content.

routing_rules.description: Documents tagged high_priority always wake regime_classifier + narrative_synthesizer regardless of other tags
Any document with chart tag must route to chart_vision
If document has zero matching routing_tags after pre-tagging, log as skipped (don't waste LLM calls). Surface in dashboard source health panel.

agent_descriptions.regime_classifier: Classifies current macro regime (both thesis taxonomy + framework taxonomy). Reads macro/rates/liquidity/growth content.
agent_descriptions.narrative_synthesizer: Extracts theses from free-form text (newsletters, podcast transcripts, manual notes). LLM-only judgment task.
agent_descriptions.technical_scorer: Scores price/volume structure per framework §5. Heuristic-first; LLM for ambiguity.
agent_descriptions.chart_vision: Multimodal LLM read of chart screenshots. Identifies levels, structure, setup type.
agent_descriptions.psychology_evaluator: Pure heuristic. Evaluates user's logged trade entries against framework §12 checklist.
agent_descriptions.sector_theme_scorer: Reads asset_themes.json. Scores sector/theme alignment with current regime.
